title: Loot Pool
description: Defines a pool of loot entries that can be rolled one or more times.

rolls.title: Rolls
rolls.description: Number of times to roll this pool. Can be a fixed number or a range object with min/max.

bonus_rolls.title: Bonus Rolls
bonus_rolls.description: Additional rolls added based on luck attribute. Can be fixed or range.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description:
Array of possible entries to select from when rolling this pool.

Properties:
• type (string)
• name (string)
• weight (int) = 1
• functions
• conditions
• pools

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Array of conditions that must be met for this pool to be rolled.

Properties:
• condition (string)
• chance (float)
• looting_multiplier (float)
• value (int)
• default_chance (float)
• peaceful (float)
• easy (float)
• normal (float)
• ... and 4 more properties

tiers.title: Tiers
tiers.description:
Tiered entry selection configuration.

Properties:
• initial_range (int)
• bonus_rolls (int)
• bonus_chance (float)
